que: What is the primary purpose of the Row widget in Flutter?
options: To arrange children vertically in a column
To arrange children horizontally in a single line

Which parameter controls how Row aligns its children vertically?

que: What is the default value of verticalDirection in Row?

options: Centers children horizontally within the Row
